foundationMotivation: Walking Gods is meant to have an epic scope and diverse ecology, ripe for many different kinds of high fantasy.
foundationGoal: I am hoping to give my players an epic experience like Skyrim, Dark Souls, and God of War through the lens of D&D.
foundationUsp: The gods of this world are real, physical presences on the Material Plane. They can be touched, spoken with, and even destroyed.
foundationThemeGenre: Walking Gods should feel consistently high magic, low-tech. Constant war and conflict stop general technological progress outside the realm of the military.
foundationThemeFeel: Walking Gods feels epic and awe-inspiring, with adventure around each corner. The New, Old, and Present world should feel like distinct and wonderful locales that ocassionally overlap.
foundationThemeTone: World is Darkish - think Witcher rather than Dark Souls.
foundationThemeThemes:
1. The presence of the gods warping the ecology and cultures of their domains.
2. Calamity strikes quickly, and without warning.
3. Dark and threatening ancient ruins in the forest or jungle
foundationThemeAgency: Players should be able to feel completely free to move in any direction they like, confident that they'll be able find adventure wherever they look. Character actions reveraberate for long stretches, but even great feats fade with time.
